description: customers can't understand how to use the app when they run it for the first time since it doesn't have any ui except the try icon so here's what i want you want to create we can call it the pop up or something that shows if someone run the application for the first time and of course if they're not using the background command argument with it which should be very clear tell the user this is a try icon you can look at the dry icon it has some examples it tells the user you need an api key maybe a small explanation within the api key and ask them to go to settings operation and tell them where to add the api key and also tell them about the help in the tray menu and there must be a big check or button say don't show this again and we can store in the configuration that don't show that is that clear so before even doing that i want to research best practice as well
